resolved_primary_target: red soda can and clear water bottle

visual_analysis.description: A red Coca-Cola can on the left side of the shelf.
A clear plastic bottle of water, located behind the green soda can.
A green Sprite can located in front of the clear water bottle.
A black F&N soda water can, located behind the green can.
A white Milkis can on the right side of the shelf.

action_plan.explanation: Pick the first requested item, red soda can, which is unobstructed.
Remove the green soda can which is in front of and blocking access to the clear water bottle.
Pick the second requested item, the clear water bottle, which is now accessible.
